description: CompositionPurple round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, ribbed collar with lace in-seam, lee badge on inner neck, lee branding in graphic print on left chest and placement print along the right lengthFittingComfortWash care Hand wash cold Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Subtly stylish, this purple t-shirt with the placement print rubbing along the right length on the front and back gives it a fashionable edge. Team it with jeans, shorts or skirts and sleek, heeled sandals for that chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
